raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/year>, XXXX XXXX XXXX charged my card {$2500.00} for work not completed. I never signed a contract. On XX/XX/year>, I released XXXX XXXX XXXX as the contractor and switched to a different contractor. 

On XX/XX/year>, the contractor is not cooperating for refund and is trying to make me sign a document with him for a partial refund. 

I need assistance from American Express with disputing the {$2500.00} transaction.
